description: Title says '7x' but 10^11 data gives rho({1,2})/rho({1,3}) = 80.75/9.11 = 8.9x. Update title to '9x'. The body already correctly reports 8.9x and explains the ratio is widening because dim_H({1,2})=0.531 > 1/2 while dim_H({1,3})=0.454 < 1/2.
action_taken: Title says '7x' but 10^11 data gives rho({1,2})/rho({1,3}) = 80.75/9.11 = 8.9x. Update title to '9x'. The body already correctly reports 8.9x and explains the ratio is widening because dim_H({1,2})=0.531 > 1/2 while dim_H({1,3})=0.454 < 1/2.
